ref: Then she sat down a long way off, because she could not bear to watch him die. And she cried bitterly.
text: ka keŋ lalig bi'ela ka ye, “Mam kʋ nyaŋi gɔti m biig ka o kpiida!” Ka zin' lallisa ka kum.
translated: The woman said to her husband, "My husband, I have seen a beautiful thing! Come and see!" And they both went to see it.

ref: The Lord saw how bad the people on earth were and that everything they thought and planned was evil.
text: Ka Zugsɔb la da nyɛ nidib la tʋʋmbɛ'ɛd nɛ ba pʋtɛnda an bɛ'ɛd saŋa wʋsa si'em la,
translated: The one who is called Zugsɔb is a good person who helps everyone and makes them happy.

ref: One day when Joseph's brothers had taken the sheep to a pasture near Shechem,
text: O bieya la da keŋ zin'ikanɛ kpi'e Sekɛm tempʋʋgin la ye ba kemi ba saam pɛ'ɛs anina.
translated: The old man said that he would not go to Sekem's farm because he was afraid of the wild animals.

ref: As Jacob continued on his way to the east,
text: Ka Jakob keŋ paae teŋ kanɛ bɛ ya-nya'aŋ la.
translated: Jacob is going to the farm to work.

ref: So the heavens and the earth and everything else were created. The Seventh Day
text: Ala ka Wina'am da maal agɔl nɛ teŋ, nɛ bʋn linɛ bɛɛ ani la wʋsa naae.
translated: The woman who has a lot of money, she doesn't know how to spend it, and she is always complaining.
